2603.16867.title: Efficient Reasoning on the Edge
2603.16867.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) with chain-of-thought reasoning achieve state-of-the-art performance across complex problem-solving tasks, but their verbose reasoning traces and large context requirements make them impractical for edge deployment. These challenges include high token generation costs, large KV-cache footprints, and inefficiencies when distilling reasoning capabilities into smaller models for mobile devices. Existing approaches often rely on distilling reasoning traces from larger models into smaller models, which are verbose and stylistically redundant, undesirable for on-device inference. In this work, we propose a lightweight approach to enable reasoning in small LLMs using LoRA adapters combined with supervised fine-tuning. We further introduce budget forcing via reinforcement learning on these adapters, significantly reducing response length with minimal accuracy loss. To address memory-bound decoding, we exploit parallel test-time scaling, improving accuracy at minor latency increase. Finally, we present a dynamic adapter-switching mechanism that activates reasoning only when needed and a KV-cache sharing strategy during prompt encoding, reducing time-to-first-token for on-device inference. Experiments on Qwen2.5-7B demonstrate that our method achieves efficient, accurate reasoning under strict resource constraints, making LLM reasoning practical for mobile scenarios. Videos demonstrating our solution running on mobile devices are available on our project page.
2603.16867.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）透過鏈式思考推理在複雜問題解決任務中達到了最先進的表現，但其冗長的推理痕跡和龐大的上下文需求使其在邊緣部署中不切實際。這些挑戰包括高昂的標記生成成本、大型KV快取佔用空間，以及在將推理能力提煉成適用於移動設備的小型模型時的低效。現有的方法通常依賴於將大型模型的推理痕跡提煉到小型模型中，而這些推理痕跡冗長且風格上重複，對於設備內推理來說並不理想。在本研究中，我們提出了一種輕量級的方法，通過結合LoRA適配器和監督微調來實現小型LLMs的推理。我們進一步引入了通過強化學習對這些適配器進行預算強制，顯著減少了響應長度，同時保持最小的準確性損失。為了解決內存限制的解碼問題，我們利用並行測試時間縮放，在輕微的延遲增加下提高了準確性。最後，我們提出了一種動態適配器切換機制，僅在需要時啟用推理，以及在提示編碼過程中的KV快取共享策略，減少設備內推理的首次標記時間。在Qwen2.5-7B上的實驗表明，我們的方法在嚴格的資源限制下實現了高效、準確的推理，使LLM推理在移動場景中變得可行。展示我們解決方案在移動設備上運行的視頻可在我們的項目頁面上找到。
2603.16867.author: Yelysei Bondarenko et.al.
2603.16867.authors: Yelysei Bondarenko, Thomas Hehn, Rob Hesselink, Romain Lepert, Fabio Valerio Massoli, Evgeny Mironov, Leyla Mirvakhabova, Tribhuvanesh Orekondy, Spyridon Stasis, Andrey Kuzmin, Anna Kuzina, Markus Nagel, Ankita Nayak, Corrado Rainone, Ork de Rooij, Paul N Whatmough, Arash Behboodi, Babak Ehteshami Bejnordi
